🚨 JUST IN: President Trump ROASTS AOC's Munich word salad while shouting out JD Vance 

"One attractive woman unable to answer questions! She doesn't do so well like JD did in college! He went to Yale, graduated at the top of his class." 😂

Vice President JD Vance in Michigan:

"We need to get the people who are making our cities less safe the hell out of our country and focus on American citizens first." https://t.co/dLAWrjBnRD

NEW: Vice President JD Vance trolls Dem Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for "freezing" at Munich when she was asked a question about Taiwan.

Vance: "I'm tempted just to freeze for 20 seconds & just stare at the cameras. Maybe [the media will] say nice things about me."

AOC at Munich: "You know... I think that uh... this is such a, uh... you know, I, I think that this is a um... this is of course, a, a very long-standing policy um..."

🇺🇸🇭🇺JUST IN: US Vice President JD Vance Heading to Hungary to Back PM Viktor Orban!

After it became clear that the EU, Zelensky, and even Zuckerberg are gunning to take down Orban, JD Vance steps in to show support ahead of Hungary’s elections. https://t.co/qsk9hgXnIh

JD Vance’s picture part hidden behind a plant at the Munich Security Conference, after he upset leaders here last year. Expect Marco Rubio’s photo will get a better spot after yesterday’s speech. Huge relief here, though beneath the charm some of the message was pretty similar…. https://t.co/jxPMXiErri

HILARIOUS President Trump: “[Secretary of State] Marco [Rubio] does it with a velvet glove, but it’s a kill… The result is the same. [Marco and JD Vance] do it very differently. And Marco, you really did yourself proud two days ago in Munich. In fact, so proud I almost terminated his employ[ment] because they were saying, ‘Why can't Trump do this?’ I do, but I say it differently. Marco, don't do any better than you did, please. Because if you do, you’re out of here.”

🚨 LMFAO 😭 JD Vance just cooked on live mic:

“I had my line ready… then POTUS called me so smart and I was like, okay, don’t pull an AOC and freeze for 20 seconds like Munich…”

“Now I’m tempted, sir… to just freeze for 20 seconds and stare into the cameras… maybe they’ll praise me the way they praise Congresswoman Cortez.” 😂😂😂

This dude’s timing is unreal.

😂 Did he just ROAST the media or AOC harder?

U.S. Vice President J.D. Vance will not attend this year's Munich Security Conference

Last year he criticized European social media censorship and persecution of dissent. The day before his speech an Islamist car-ramming terror attack occurred in Munich

https://t.co/zghEBgnQ0p

After JD Vance’s headline-making speech last year, all eyes were on US Secretary of State Marco Rubio at the Munich Security Conference today. German Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul had this reaction to Rubio's message. https://t.co/sQfjmvU58i

🚨 LMAO! VP JD Vance just absolutely DESTROYED AOC after her embarrassing remarks in Munich

“That was the most uncomfortable 20 seconds of television I’ve ever seen!”

“Does anybody REALLY believe that AOC has very thoughtful ideas about global world order or about what the US should do with our policy in Asia or our policy in Europe?”

“This is a person who doesn’t KNOW what she actually thinks.”

“That was EMBARRASSING. If I had given that answer I was say, ‘maybe I’ll go read a book about China and Taiwan before I go out on the world stage again.’”

NEWS OUTLET SANCTIONED FOR PUBLISHING VP VANCE’S ANTI-CENSORSHIP SPEECH

JD Vance’s 2025 Munich speech warned that Europe’s biggest threat was its own crackdown on free speech. Then a Belgian press ethics body sanctioned 21News for publishing the full transcript without the approved lecture attached.

Source: NewsForce

Vice President JD Vance TROLLS Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-NY) for FREEZING at the Munich Security Conference: “I didn’t want to repeat our Congresswoman who froze for 20 seconds in Munich. Now, I’m tempted just to freeze for 20 seconds and just stare at the cameras. Maybe [the media will] say nice things about me like they do about Congresswoman Cortez.”

WATCH🚨: JD Vance just roasted AOC's Munich meltdown, barely holding back laughter over her epic word salad on Taiwan.

"You bring me on your show and show the most uncomfortable 20 seconds of TV I've ever seen!"

Spot on—when the script runs out, the left crumbles. AOC should stick to selfies and sit this foreign policy stuff out. World stage isn't her TikTok feed.

🚨 JUST IN: Benny Johnson says a JD Vance + Marco Rubio 2028 ticket would be a straight-up nightmare matchup for AOC after what he calls her Munich “word-salad” moment.

He says this felt like AOC’s “2028 debut”… and it flopped.

He even compared Vance/Rubio to iconic sports duos — basically: two heavy-hitters on one ticket. 🔥

And then he went scorched-earth on AOC’s performance, claiming she stalled for 27 painful seconds when asked to define “Taiwan,” and arguing that she looked totally unprepared on basic geography.

He also claimed she’s been misleading voters about her background, saying she’s not really from the Bronx and alleging that’s proof she’s being dishonest about bigger things… including whether she’s already planning a 2028 run.

His takeaway?

“Let her keep going… we love it. AOC, keep yapping!” @bennyjohnson 🔥

Reply-seed: If 2028 was today, who wins that matchup — Vance/Rubio or AOC + whoever? 👇

🚨 BREAKING: President Trump praises Marco Rubio and JD Vance when asked about 2028.

"That's something I don't have to worry about now. I've got 3 years to go. JD's fantastic — and Marco. They're both fantastic. I think Marco did a great job in Munich"
https://t.co/Qns8QZlxYi

JD Vance attended the Munich Security Conference where he criticized European leaders, accusing them of being petty tyrants for restricting freedom of speech. He specifically mentioned the case of a British man who was arrested for praying outside an abortion clinic. https://t.co/GR35DVKK1O

Vice President JD Vance RIPS into Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez over her TRAIN WRECK appearance at the Munich Security Conference.

This was brutal.

VANCE: “Well, thank you, Mr. President, very much, for your leadership, but also for the kind words about me personally.”

“I knew exactly what I wanted to say, but after the President said that I was smart, I did not want to repeat our Congresswoman who froze for 20 seconds over Munich…”

“Now I’m tempted, sir, just to freeze for 20 seconds and stare at the cameras…maybe they’ll say nice things about me like they did about Congresswoman Cortez.”

quotedTweet.text:
This moment is an instant classic from Trump’s second term.

Vice President Vance and Secretary Rubio burst out laughing as President Trump compares their leadership styles — “Marco does it with a velvet glove.”

First up was Vance:

TRUMP: “JD’s been great. Thank you very much.”

“He gets a little bit tough on occasion. We have to slow him down, just a little bit on occasion.”

“He says his mind.”

Then came Rubio:

TRUMP: “Then we have the opposite extreme.”

“We have your friend sitting in the back, your best friend sitting in the back, Marco.”

“Marco does it with a velvet glove but it’s a kill, right?”

“The result is the same. They do it very differently.”

“And Marco, you really did yourself proud two days ago in Munich.”

“In fact, so proud I almost terminated his employee because they were saying why can’t Trump do this? I do but I say it differently.”

“But Marco, don’t do any better than you did, please. Because if you do you are out of here!”
